description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. The addressee is asked to intervene in a divorce case where the woman is being treated unfairly by her husband, who is trying to bilk her out of her dowry (qumāsh) and delayed marriage payment (muʾakhkhar). Likely a draft, based on the format and numerous corrections. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית, כנראה טיוטה. מבקש התערבות בתיק גירושין שבו הבעל מנסה לרמות את אשתו מנדוניה ומוהר.
